Fixed-effect bootstrap control

Source: R/inference.R
bootstrap_control.Rd

Fixed-effect bootstrap control

Usage

bootstrap_control(
  nsim = 999L,
  seed = NULL,
  failed_refit_policy = c("exclude", "count_extreme", "abort")
)

Arguments

nsim

Requested bootstrap replicate count.

seed

Optional integer seed. NULL leaves the Rust RNG seed unspecified and records that state in row details.

failed_refit_policy

How failed refits are accounted for. Stable Rust wire labels are "exclude", "count_extreme", and "abort".

Value

A list used by contrast(..., method = "bootstrap").
